xanesnet.datasets.torch package¶

Standard PyTorch dataset exports.

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.EnvEmbedData(descriptor_features=None, distance_features=None, intensities=None, energies=None, c_star=None, lengths=None, file_name=None, basis=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Container for one environment-embedding sample or batch.

descriptor_features¶

Per-site descriptor tensor with shape (n_sites, n_features) or (batch, max_sites, n_features).

distance_features¶

Per-site absorber distance tensor with shape (n_sites,) or (batch, max_sites) in Angstrom.

intensities¶

Spectrum intensity tensor with shape (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

energies¶

Energy grid tensor with shape (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

c_star¶

Gaussian basis coefficient tensor.

lengths¶

Original per-sample site counts for padded batches.

file_name¶

Source file name metadata for one sample or a batch.

basis¶

Spectral basis attached at runtime and excluded from saved state.

descriptor_features: Tensor | None = None¶
distance_features: Tensor | None = None¶
intensities: Tensor | None = None¶
energies: Tensor | None = None¶
c_star: Tensor | None = None¶
lengths: Tensor | None = None¶
file_name: str | list[Any] | None = None¶
basis: SpectralBasis | None = None¶
to(device)[source]¶

Move tensor-like attributes to device in place.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device accepted by torch.Tensor.to.

Return type:

EnvEmbedData

Returns:

This data object after moving tensor-like attributes.

to_state_dict()[source]¶

Serialize this sample to a torch-saveable state dictionary.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Returns:

Dictionary containing tensor and metadata fields.

classmethod from_state_dict(state)[source]¶

Create data from a state dictionary.

Parameters:

state (dict[str, Any]) – State dictionary produced by to_state_dict.

Return type:

EnvEmbedData

Returns:

Reconstructed environment-embedding data object.

save(path)[source]¶

Save this data object to disk.

Parameters:

path (str) – Destination .pth path.

Return type:

str

Returns:

The destination path.

classmethod load(path)[source]¶

Load environment-embedding data from disk.

Parameters:

path (str) – Source .pth path.

Return type:

EnvEmbedData

Returns:

Loaded environment-embedding data object.

__init__(descriptor_features=None, distance_features=None, intensities=None, energies=None, c_star=None, lengths=None, file_name=None, basis=None)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torch.EnvEmbedDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, env_radius, descriptors)[source]¶

Bases: TorchDataset

Dataset that creates absorber-centered environment embeddings.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • widths_eV (list[float]) – Gaussian basis widths in eV.

  • basis_stride (int) – Energy-grid stride used when creating a Gaussian basis.

  • basis_path (str | None) – Optional serialized spectral basis path.

  • env_radius (float | None) – Periodic-neighbor cutoff in Angstrom for structures.

  • descriptors (list[Config]) – Descriptor configuration objects.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, env_radius, descriptors)[source]¶

Initialize the environment-embedding dataset.

descriptor_list: list[Descriptor]¶
basis: SpectralBasis | None¶
collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate variable-length environment samples into a padded batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[EnvEmbedData]) – Environment-embedding samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

EnvEmbedData

Returns:

Batched data with padded environment tensors and lengths metadata.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this environment-embedding dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.DescriptorData(x=None, y=None, energies=None, fourier=None, c_star=None, file_name=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Container for one descriptor dataset sample or batch.

x¶

Model input tensor, commonly (n_features,) or (batch, n_features).

y¶

Model target tensor, commonly (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

energies¶

Energy grid tensor with shape (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

fourier¶

Optional Fourier feature tensor.

c_star¶

Optional Gaussian basis coefficient tensor.

file_name¶

Source file name metadata for one sample or a batch.

x: Tensor | None = None¶
y: Tensor | None = None¶
energies: Tensor | None = None¶
fourier: Tensor | None = None¶
c_star: Tensor | None = None¶
file_name: str | list[Any] | None = None¶
to(device)[source]¶

Move tensor attributes to device in place.

Parameters:

device (str | device) – Target device accepted by torch.Tensor.to.

Return type:

DescriptorData

Returns:

This data object after moving tensor attributes.

to_state_dict()[source]¶

Serialize this sample to a torch-saveable state dictionary.

Return type:

dict[str, Any]

Returns:

Dictionary containing tensor and metadata fields.

classmethod from_state_dict(state)[source]¶

Create data from a state dictionary.

Parameters:

state (dict[str, Any]) – State dictionary produced by to_state_dict.

Return type:

DescriptorData

Returns:

Reconstructed descriptor data object.

save(path)[source]¶

Save this data object to disk.

Parameters:

path (str) – Destination .pth path.

Return type:

str

Returns:

The destination path.

classmethod load(path)[source]¶

Load descriptor data from disk.

Parameters:

path (str) – Source .pth path.

Return type:

DescriptorData

Returns:

Loaded descriptor data object.

__init__(x=None, y=None, energies=None, fourier=None, c_star=None, file_name=None)¶
class xanesnet.datasets.torch.DescriptorDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, mode, fourier, fourier_concat, gaussian, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, descriptors)[source]¶

Bases: TorchDataset

Dataset that converts structures to descriptor tensors.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • mode (str) – forward for descriptor-to-spectrum or reverse for spectrum-to-descriptor.

  • fourier (bool) – Whether to add Fourier-transformed spectra.

  • fourier_concat (bool) – Whether Fourier features concatenate real and imaginary components.

  • gaussian (bool) – Whether to fit spectra to a Gaussian basis.

  • widths_eV (list[float]) – Gaussian basis widths in eV.

  • basis_stride (int) – Energy-grid stride used when creating a Gaussian basis.

  • basis_path (str | None) – Optional serialized spectral basis path.

  • descriptors (list[Config]) – Descriptor configuration objects.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, mode, fourier, fourier_concat, gaussian, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, descriptors)[source]¶

Initialize the descriptor dataset.

descriptor_list: list[Descriptor]¶
basis: SpectralBasis | None¶
collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate descriptor samples into a batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[DescriptorData]) – Descriptor samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

DescriptorData

Returns:

Batched descriptor data with stacked tensor fields.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this descriptor dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.DescriptorDatasetMp(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, mode, fourier, fourier_concat, gaussian, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, descriptors, num_workers)[source]¶

Bases: MpDatasetMixin, DescriptorDataset

Multiprocessing variant of DescriptorDataset.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource used during preparation.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • mode (str) – forward for descriptor-to-spectrum or reverse for spectrum-to-descriptor.

  • fourier (bool) – Whether to add Fourier-transformed spectra.

  • fourier_concat (bool) – Whether Fourier features concatenate real and imaginary components.

  • gaussian (bool) – Whether to fit spectra to a Gaussian basis.

  • widths_eV (list[float]) – Gaussian basis widths in eV.

  • basis_stride (int) – Energy-grid stride used when creating a Gaussian basis.

  • basis_path (str | None) – Optional serialized spectral basis path.

  • descriptors (list[Config]) – Descriptor configuration objects.

  • num_workers (int | None) – Requested worker process count.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, mode, fourier, fourier_concat, gaussian, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, descriptors, num_workers)[source]¶

Initialize a multiprocessing descriptor dataset.

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.EnvEmbedDatasetMp(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, env_radius, descriptors, num_workers)[source]¶

Bases: MpDatasetMixin, EnvEmbedDataset

Multiprocessing variant of EnvEmbedDataset.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource used during preparation.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • widths_eV (list[float]) – Gaussian basis widths in eV.

  • basis_stride (int) – Energy-grid stride used when creating a Gaussian basis.

  • basis_path (str | None) – Optional serialized spectral basis path.

  • env_radius (float | None) – Periodic-neighbor cutoff in Angstrom.

  • descriptors (list[Config]) – Descriptor configuration objects.

  • num_workers (int | None) – Requested worker process count.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, env_radius, descriptors, num_workers)[source]¶

Initialize a multiprocessing environment-embedding dataset.

xanesnet.datasets.torch.descriptor module¶

Descriptor-based tensor dataset implementation.

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.descriptor.DescriptorData(x=None, y=None, energies=None, fourier=None, c_star=None, file_name=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Container for one descriptor dataset sample or batch.

x¶

Model input tensor, commonly (n_features,) or (batch, n_features).

y¶

Model target tensor, commonly (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

energies¶

Energy grid tensor with shape (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

fourier¶

Optional Fourier feature tensor.

c_star¶

Optional Gaussian basis coefficient tensor.

file_name¶

Source file name metadata for one sample or a batch.

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.descriptor.DescriptorDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, mode, fourier, fourier_concat, gaussian, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, descriptors)[source]¶

Bases: TorchDataset

Dataset that converts structures to descriptor tensors.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • mode (str) – forward for descriptor-to-spectrum or reverse for spectrum-to-descriptor.

  • fourier (bool) – Whether to add Fourier-transformed spectra.

  • fourier_concat (bool) – Whether Fourier features concatenate real and imaginary components.

  • gaussian (bool) – Whether to fit spectra to a Gaussian basis.

  • widths_eV (list[float]) – Gaussian basis widths in eV.

  • basis_stride (int) – Energy-grid stride used when creating a Gaussian basis.

  • basis_path (str | None) – Optional serialized spectral basis path.

  • descriptors (list[Config]) – Descriptor configuration objects.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, mode, fourier, fourier_concat, gaussian, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, descriptors)[source]¶

Initialize the descriptor dataset.

descriptor_list: list[Descriptor]¶
basis: SpectralBasis | None¶
collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate descriptor samples into a batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[DescriptorData]) – Descriptor samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

DescriptorData

Returns:

Batched descriptor data with stacked tensor fields.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this descriptor dataset.

xanesnet.datasets.torch.envembed module¶

Environment-embedding tensor dataset implementation.

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.envembed.EnvEmbedData(descriptor_features=None, distance_features=None, intensities=None, energies=None, c_star=None, lengths=None, file_name=None, basis=None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Container for one environment-embedding sample or batch.

descriptor_features¶

Per-site descriptor tensor with shape (n_sites, n_features) or (batch, max_sites, n_features).

distance_features¶

Per-site absorber distance tensor with shape (n_sites,) or (batch, max_sites) in Angstrom.

intensities¶

Spectrum intensity tensor with shape (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

energies¶

Energy grid tensor with shape (n_energies,) or (batch, n_energies).

c_star¶

Gaussian basis coefficient tensor.

lengths¶

Original per-sample site counts for padded batches.

file_name¶

Source file name metadata for one sample or a batch.

basis¶

Spectral basis attached at runtime and excluded from saved state.

descriptor_features: Tensor | None = None¶
distance_features: Tensor | None = None¶
intensities: Tensor | None = None¶
energies: Tensor | None = None¶
c_star: Tensor | None = None¶
lengths: Tensor | None = None¶
file_name: str | list[Any] | None = None¶
basis: SpectralBasis | None = None¶

class xanesnet.datasets.torch.envembed.EnvEmbedDataset(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, env_radius, descriptors)[source]¶

Bases: TorchDataset

Dataset that creates absorber-centered environment embeddings.

Parameters:

  • dataset_type (str) – Registered dataset type name.

  • datasource (DataSource) – Raw datasource of pymatgen structures or molecules.

  • root (str) – Directory that stores processed .pth files.

  • preload (bool) – Whether to preload processed samples.

  • skip_prepare (bool) – Whether to reuse existing processed files.

  • split_ratios (list[float] | None) – Optional split ratios.

  • split_indexfile (str | None) – Optional path to split indices.

  • widths_eV (list[float]) – Gaussian basis widths in eV.

  • basis_stride (int) – Energy-grid stride used when creating a Gaussian basis.

  • basis_path (str | None) – Optional serialized spectral basis path.

  • env_radius (float | None) – Periodic-neighbor cutoff in Angstrom for structures.

  • descriptors (list[Config]) – Descriptor configuration objects.

__init__(dataset_type, datasource, root, preload, skip_prepare, split_ratios, split_indexfile, widths_eV, basis_stride, basis_path, env_radius, descriptors)[source]¶

Initialize the environment-embedding dataset.

descriptor_list: list[Descriptor]¶
basis: SpectralBasis | None¶
collate_fn(batch)[source]¶

Collate variable-length environment samples into a padded batch.

Parameters:

batch (list[EnvEmbedData]) – Environment-embedding samples loaded by __getitem__.

Return type:

EnvEmbedData

Returns:

Batched data with padded environment tensors and lengths metadata.

property signature: Config¶

Dataset configuration signature.

Returns:

Configuration values that identify this environment-embedding dataset.
